notableMoments: Didier Drogba was the face of Ivorian football and helped end the country's civil war
Drew into the 'Group of Death' at both the 2006 and 2010 World Cups
2006 squad was dubbed the 'golden generation' with Drogba, Touré, Eboué, and Kalou
Won the 2024 Africa Cup of Nations as hosts despite a rocky start
Never advanced past the group stage despite consistently strong squads
Returning to the World Cup in 2026 after missing the 2018 and 2022 editions
